domain_description: 液流电池（Redox Flow Battery）研究领域
domain_context:
You are an expert in redox flow battery (RFB) research, with deep knowledge of vanadium (VRFB), iron-chromium (ICRFB), zinc-bromine, and organic flow battery systems. You understand electrochemistry, membrane science, electrode materials, and battery testing protocols.

In this task you will extract structured knowledge from RFB literature.
Follow the ontology, rules, and output format specified below EXACTLY.

entity_types.name: ACTIVE_SPECIES
entity_types.description: Redox-active molecules/ions, redox couples, supporting electrolytes, additives, solvent precursors, salt reagents

entity_types.name: MEMBRANE
entity_types.description: Ion-exchange membranes, porous separators, and modifications

entity_types.name: ELECTRODE
entity_types.description: Electrodes, bipolar plates, current collectors. INCLUDES every named derivative state

entity_types.name: CONDITION
entity_types.description: Parameters during cell operation or synthesis/pretreatment

entity_types.name: METRIC
entity_types.description: Cell-level indicators or intrinsic material characterization

entity_types.name: DEGRADATION
entity_types.description: Failure phenomena AND their underlying mechanisms, combined

relation_types.name: COMPOSITION
relation_types.description: A is a component / precursor / product of B

relation_types.name: OPERATION
relation_types.description: A and B are co-present in the same experimental setup or test condition

relation_types.name: COMPARISON
relation_types.description: A and B are compared under a shared criterion

critical_rules: Derived electrode names are SEPARATE entities
Chemical identity precision (metal ≠ ion ≠ redox couple ≠ salt)
Numeric values MUST be split (value, unit fields)
Preserve original names, do not canonicalize
